name: Ceramic Oil Pour Bottle Cream - Figmint™: Stoneware Oil Dispenser with Stainless Steel & Wood Lid, 18.7oz Capacity
description:
Whether you're sauteing vegetables or whipping up salad dressing, do it in style with this Ceramic Oil Pour Bottle from Figmint™. This pour bottle is designed with a tapered stainless steel spout for easy and controlled dispensing. Featuring a cream ceramic design with wood accent, it allows you to keep oil close at hand, while adding a dash of style to your kitchen counter or dining table.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
